title: Anchor Mark Button
prompt:
Create a production-ready Anchor Mark Button using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. The component is a deliberate save control for a document margin: a small cobalt anchor mark slides from the left edge into a stable saved position while the label changes from Mark for review to Marked. Frame it in a light Bento setting with a #F4F5F6 canvas, a white panel, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, a soft neutral shadow, #111111 type, and #4A4A4F supporting copy. Cobalt is the single bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card or rely on color alone to communicate state.

Use one semantic button with aria-pressed, an adjacent polite live region, and a visible 3px dark focus ring. Click, Enter, and Space must toggle the same state. Hover lifts the button 2px over 180ms and press compresses it 1px over 90ms. Move the anchor mark with a spring using stiffness 360 and damping 28, then crossfade the label and short status over 160ms. The saved and unsaved states must be clear even without animation. Use local React state only; do not use timers, random values, browser storage, remote assets, or network requests.

Keep a minimum 44px target and readable one-line label at 320px. In larger detail previews, allow the enclosing Bento panel to breathe without changing the control. Keep logical tab order and AA contrast. Prefer transform and opacity animations, respect prefers-reduced-motion with an immediate change or 120ms fade, and provide complete TypeScript React client code plus a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css: /* Suggested HTML: */ .uiwiki-anchor{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;min-height:48px;padding:0 16px;border:0;border-radius:16px;background:#111;color:#fff;font:800 14px system-ui;transition:transform 180ms ease}.uiwiki-anchor i{width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;background:#2563eb;transition:transform 220ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1)}.uiwiki-anchor[aria-pressed="true"] i{transform:translateX(112px)}.uiwiki-anchor:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}.uiwiki-anchor:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-anchor,.uiwiki-anchor i{transition:none}}
